title: Unresolved import
explanation: This error occurs when a use statement refers to a module, type, or item that does not exist at the specified path. Common causes include typos, missing crate dependencies, or incorrect module structure.
example_bad:
use std::collection::HashMap; // Error: typo in 'collections'
use serde::Serialize; // Error if serde not in Cargo.toml
use crate::models::User; // Error if module doesn't exist
tip: Check spelling carefully. Use `cargo doc --open` to browse available items in your dependencies.
